CVE-2020-25265.title: AppImage libappimage before 1.0.3 allows attackers to trigger an  ...
CVE-2020-25265.summary: AppImage libappimage before 1.0.3 allows attackers to trigger an overwrite of a system-installed .desktop file by providing a .desktop file that contains Name= with path components.

CVE-2020-25266.title: AppImage appimaged before 1.0.3 does not properly check whether a ...
CVE-2020-25266.summary: AppImage appimaged before 1.0.3 does not properly check whether a downloaded file is a valid appimage. For example, it will accept a crafted mp3 file that contains an appimage, and install it.
